description_long: This is a small, single-engine propeller airplane with a high-wing configuration and a conventional tail. The fuselage is primarily white with a red accent stripe running along the side and tail, and the registration number is visible on the side. The cockpit is enclosed with clear windows, and the landing gear consists of two main wheels and a nose wheel, all fixed and exposed. The wings are straight and mounted above the fuselage, supported by struts for added stability. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the tail features a single vertical stabilizer with a horizontal stabilizer at the base. The overall design suggests a light general aviation aircraft suitable for short flights and training purposes.
description: A small, high-wing, single-propeller airplane with a white and red color scheme, fixed tricycle landing gear, and an enclosed cockpit. The design is typical of light general aviation aircraft.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high-mounted wing, red accent stripe, and fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, nose wheel, and the full wingspan with supporting struts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the cockpit windows, tail design, and the red accent on the fuselage and tail.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail assembly, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the main landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with supporting struts and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer at the base.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single or dual seat.
